---
name: input-check
description: >-
  Run a quick input device health check. Execute these in parallel
---

<!-- GENERATED BY hg-global-skill-sync.sh FROM ~/.claude/commands/input-check.md; DO NOT EDIT -->

Run a quick input device health check. Execute these in parallel:

1. `systemctl is-active logid makima` — service status
2. `bluetoothctl show | grep -E "Powered|Name"` — BT adapter state
3. `bluetoothctl devices Connected` — connected devices
4. Use `input_status` MCP tool for battery levels
5. Use `input_get_solaar_settings` MCP tool for current MX Master 4 settings
6. `journalctl -u logid -u makima --since "1 hour ago" -p err --no-pager | tail -10` — recent errors

Summarize: services OK/failed, BT adapter on/off, devices connected, battery levels, any errors.
